about.description1: Rigorous Full-Stack Developer, I combine 5 months of experience in an **EDTECH** environment with expertise in **software design**. My approach is based on creating **scalable solutions** that precisely meet business needs.
about.description2: Bachelor's student at ECE Paris, I have developed a solid culture of software **architecture**. I master the full development cycle, from functional analysis to technical implementation of **business value**.
about.description3: Focused on innovation, I natively integrate AI into my workflows to optimize application performance and provide a smooth and powerful user experience.
